summary: Round-1 fixes close the cited issues, but `verify.mjs` still has a false-success path for malformed `modes.json` references.

findings.title: Verifier does not validate the configured `sharedVoiceRef`/`briefTemplateRef`, so runtime wiring can still break after a passing verify
findings.recommendation: After parsing `modes.json`, validate that `config.sharedVoiceRef` and `config.briefTemplateRef` are present strings and that the referenced files exist, the same way `soulRef` is checked. Add a regression test that mutates those refs to a missing path and expects verify to fail.
